script: echo === services ===; systemctl list-unit-files 2>&1 | grep -i mskai; echo; echo === home dirs ===; sudo ls -la /home/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'mskai|claude'; echo; echo === files ===; sudo find /home /opt /etc/systemd/system -maxdepth 4 -iname '*mskai*' 2>/dev/null | head -60; echo; echo === mskai service status ===; systemctl is-active mskai-bot.service mskai-responder.service 2>&1; echo; echo === recent responder errors ===; sudo tail -10 /home/mskai/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null || sudo tail -10 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null || echo no error log found; echo; echo === token shape ===; wc -c /etc/claude-tokens/mskai.env; head -c 60 /etc/claude-tokens/mskai.env | tr '\n' ' '; echo
